title: Faithfull 30M (98ft) Reinforced Hose 12.7 mm (1/2 Inch) Diameter – PVC Garden Hose Pipe
features: Reinforced PVC Hose - Crafted from superior quality, flexible PVC with three-ply polyester fibre reinforcement, the Faithfull Hose is built to withstand heavy use, delivering exceptional durability and strength. The durable construction offers resistance to wear, tears, leaks and kinks for long-lasting reliability.

UV & Temperature Resistant - Built to withstand harmful UV sunlight and extreme temperatures from -10°C to +40°C, this hardwearing hose ensures reliable performance even in tougher outdoor environments.
Easy Clean & Algae Resistant - The Faithfull Hose is easy to clean and designed to resist algae build up, ensuring it remains in excellent condition all year round.

Specifications – 30 Metre (98ft) in Length and 12.7 mm (1/2 Inch) Diameter, this Faithfull Hose offers ample flexibility and reach and provides a consistent water flow, standing up to high-pressure applications with a bursting pressure of up to 20 bar.

Faithfull 5 year Manufacturers Guarantee - Designed for versatility, convenience and longevity, the Faithfull Reinforced Hose delivers high performance in various garden and outdoor cleaning and watering tasks.
